title: Guaglio
writer: Aldo Buzzi, Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Luigi Comencini
actors: Adolfo Celi, Tina Pica, Mario Russo
plot: On his way to Africa, Don Pietro, a young missionary priest has his suitcase stolen in the station of Naples. While making every effort to retrieve his baggage he finds out how devastated and miserable the city of Naples is. Learn...
